rationale: C19 next_cycle_plan called for bug hunt C19 + JourneyMapDisplay visual polish. Bug hunt found BUG-031 MEDIUM: _build_run_summary() only passed biome/card_index/life/currency/merlin_found — missing story_log, oghams_used, minigames_won, minigames_played, faction_rep_delta. This meant EndRunScreen showed zeros for all run stats and JourneyMapDisplay always displayed 'Aucune carte jouee'. Fixed by reading full run state from MerlinStore + story_log from WalkEventController.get_story_log(). Also added card_idx field to WalkEventController story entries for consistent numbering. Feature: JourneyMapDisplay rewritten from basic circles+lines to full CRT-styled timeline — nodes with glow rings colored by primary effect (green=heal, red=damage, phosphor=neutral), dashed phosphor connecting lines, effect pips (up to 3 colored dots per node showing heal/damage/reputation/ogham/mission effects), final node with arc glow ring and V/X victory/death glyph, scroll indicators for long journeys, cached terminal font, atmospheric empty state message.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C20 (verify story_log data pipeline: WalkEventController.get_story_log() → _build_run_summary() → GFC._build_end_run_data() → EndRunScreen.show_results() → JourneyMapDisplay.setup() — full chain). Then feature: faction ending screen — EndRunScreen._on_continue_pressed() reads faction_endings_available but GFC._build_end_run_data() never populates it. Need to compute eligible faction endings (rep >= 80) and add them to end_run_data. This enables the faction choice panel at end of victorious runs.
